title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Jarul, Unknown person #11, King Harald, Usopp, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's just a sign of the times.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's nice to know that my great-great grandchildren won't see combat. They want peace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's your duty to whip them into shape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's coming from the throne room!!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: Thank you for coming, Elder JARUL.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I- I mean young master! It's a pleasure to have you back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, let me just consult with the King...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He summoned me!! And this is my home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right?! ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been quite a while since we've shared a bath...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long's it been, three, maybe four years?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been ten years since the captain died.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That must feel like forever ago to you, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I honestly just wanted to be a carefree pirate with buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some things I'd like to know..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: understandable, you were a child of destiny, but let's not dwell on tricky topics today, shanks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, remember little garden? The island where we met Dorry and Brogy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This spot really is the best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is what a human-giant household is like...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have some lingering tart! And help yourself to drinks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shankun, got any juicy old stories about Jarul?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About Gyaban-san? Oh, I've got one! Any time we made it to a port, there were who knows how many-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You brat! If you want to make it out of this country alive, you'll zip it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the king of Elbaf. The people think of him like a god.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, I met him at Mary Geoise. We got along alright.

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
